title: stelis globosa
intro: Stelis globosa, also known as the globosa orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis globosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
